message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
    LifeLineBorderColor #666666
    ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
    ActorBorderColor #666666
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
    ParticipantBorderColor #666666
    ArrowColor #000000
    ArrowThickness 1
    NoteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
    NoteBorderColor #CCCCCC
    BoxBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
    BoxBorderColor #CCCCCC
}

box "Client" #F0F0F0
    participant "client" as client
    participant "tcpclient" as tcpclient
end box

box "Server" #F0F0F0
    participant "tcpserver" as tcpserver
    participant "server" as server
end box

== Initialization ==
server -> tcpserver: listen
activate tcpserver
note right of tcpserver: LISTEN
deactivate tcpserver

== Connection Establishment ==
client -> tcpclient: connect
activate tcpclient
tcpclient -> tcpserver: SYN
activate tcpserver
note right of tcpclient: SYN-SENT
note right of tcpserver: SYN-RECEIVED
tcpserver -> tcpclient: SYN, ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver: ACK
note right of tcpclient: ESTABLISHED
note right of tcpserver: ESTABLISHED
deactivate tcpclient
deactivate tcpserver

== Data Transfer ==
server -> tcpserver: EPOLLIN
activate tcpserver
tcpserver -> server: write
tcpserver -> tcpclient: PSH, ACK
activate tcpclient
tcpclient -> tcpserver: ACK
deactivate tcpserver
tcpclient -> client: EPOLLIN
activate client
client -> tcpclient: read
deactivate client
deactivate tcpclient

== Connection Termination (Server Side) ==
server -> tcpserver: close
activate tcpserver
note right of tcpserver: FIN_WAIT1
tcpserver -> tcpclient: FIN, ACK
activate tcpclient
note right of tcpclient: CLOSE_WAIT
tcpclient -> tcpserver: ACK
deactivate tcpserver
note right of tcpserver: FIN_WAIT2
tcpclient -> client: EPOLLRDHUP
activate client
client -> tcpclient: close
deactivate client
note right of tcpclient: LAST_ACK
tcpclient -> tcpserver: FIN
activate tcpserver
tcpserver -> tcpclient: ACK
deactivate tcpclient
note right of tcpclient: CLOSE
deactivate tcpserver
note right of tcpserver: TIMEWAIT
tcpserver -> tcpserver: timer 60s
note right of tcpserver: CLOSE

@enduml
```
